calendar.matters:
Motion To Set Aside Dismissal
Off Calendar Jun-23-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Bank of America, N.A.'s unopposed Motion To Set Aside Dismissal is GRANTED.

Section 473(b) provides: "The court may, upon any terms as may be just, relieve a party or his or her legal representative from a judgment, dismissal, order, or other proceeding taken against him or her through his or her mistake, inadvertence, surprise, or excusable neglect."

Good cause appearing, the court vacates the 5/5/2026 Order Dismissing Entire Action. The matter is returned to the trial calendar.

Moving Party is ordered to prepare a proposed order quoting the above verbatim and email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org prior to the time set for hearing.

No proposed order received. Moving party failed to provide and follow the court's order.

Counsel for the moving party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-05-2026 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Kenneth Tsang, Esq. appeared for plaintiff.
The Order to Show Cause is re-set to at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk: D. Diaz; Not reported. (610)
